The '''Transport''' was an aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used by the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Royal Naboo]] to transport troops or personnel across bodies of [[Water/Legends|water]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
